text:
Created attachment 227741
v1: adjust RUN_DEPENDS

$ pkg install libdrm
$ pkg-config libdrm_intel --cflags
Package pthread-stubs was not found in the pkg-config search path.
Perhaps you should add the directory containing `pthread-stubs.pc'
to the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable
Package 'pthread-stubs', required by 'libdrm_intel', not found
